title: Peruvian-Style Grilled Beef with Aji Amarillo Sauce
description: A delicious and flavorful Peruvian-inspired dish featuring grilled beef and a spicy Aji Amarillo sauce. This recipe is perfect for a dinner party or special occasion.
instructions: 2. Season the flank steak with salt and black pepper.
3. Grill the steak for 5-7 minutes per side, or until it reaches your desired level of doneness.
4. Let the steak rest for 5 minutes before slicing it thinly against the grain.
5. Meanwhile, roast the Aji Amarillo peppers over an open flame or in the oven until charred.
6. Peel the peppers and puree them in a blender with garlic, cilantro, lime juice, and pollo broth.
7. Strain the sauce through a fine-mesh sieve into a bowl.
8. Serve the sliced steak with the Aji Amarillo sauce spooned over the top.
